Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/vnfsdk-dovetail-integration-master-dovetail-integration-verify-python/43

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Dear Moshe, From testing point of view, it would make more sense to use the ONAP CLI than the direct rest calls. and ONAP CLI already delivers the CLI for performing most of the ONAP actions. so I would like you to consider the ONAP CLI for making ONAP related test cases. Here i observed that , what ONAP CLI does already, you are repeating here the same and it would be double effor if we continue this path.

Also as we are coming up with new architecture, i would suggest to make use of it instead of placing under vnftest.

in vnftest, its better to concentrate those test cases which not bound to ONAP.

Patch Set 1:

> Dear Moshe, From testing point of view, it would make more sense to
 > use the ONAP CLI than the direct rest calls. and ONAP CLI already
 > delivers the CLI for performing most of the ONAP actions. so I
 > would like you to consider the ONAP CLI for making ONAP related
 > test cases. Here i observed that , what ONAP CLI does already, you
 > are repeating here the same and it would be double effor if we
 > continue this path.
 > 
 > Also as we are coming up with new architecture, i would suggest to
 > make use of it instead of placing under vnftest.
 > 
 > in vnftest, its better to concentrate those test cases which not
 > bound to ONAP.

Hi
Thanks for you remark, I agree completely.
I was not familiar with the ONAP CLI and therefore created the tests with direct REST calls.
When we integrate the CLI into VNFTEST I will convert the steps to use the CLI instead of direct REST calls.

Removed the following votes:

* Code-Review-1 by Kanagaraj Manickam <kanagaraj.manickam@huawei.com>

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

I don't understand your response to Kanagaraj's comments.  What is your plan to incorporate the CLI? Are you updating this commit?

Patch Set 1:

> I don't understand your response to Kanagaraj's comments.  What is
 > your plan to incorporate the CLI? Are you updating this commit?

currently there are 3 test cases that call ONAP APIs with a REST client.
Kanagaraj suggests that we use OCLI instead of REST client and I agree. However, integrating the OCLI is a task ahead of us and will require some investigation. After it is integrated we can refactor the existing tests.
Note that only the call method will be changed, the parameter handling within the test cases as well as parsing of JSON responses are still different between Amsterdam and Beijing, therefore, versioned test cases are still needed - thus this code should be commited.

Patch Set 1:

Dear Moshe, sure. no issues. i have created an JIRA for tracking this and pls refer https://jira.onap.org/browse/VNFSDK-306
Change has been successfully merged by Chris Donley
